initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT picking_line.product_id, AVG(picking_line.qty) AS avg_qty
FROM picking_line
JOIN picking_list ON picking_line.picklist_id = picking_list.id
WHERE picking_line.order_id = 421
GROUP BY picking_line.product_id;

SELECT picking_line.product_id, AVG(picking_line.qty) AS avg_qty
FROM picking_line
JOIN picking_list ON picking_line.picklist_id = picking_list.id
WHERE picking_line.order_id = 421
GROUP BY picking_line.product_id;

SELECT 
    picking_line.product_id,
    AVG(picking_line.qty) AS avg_qty
FROM 
    picking_line
JOIN 
    picking_list ON picking_line.picklist_id = picking_list.id
JOIN 
    orders ON picking_line.order_id = orders.id
JOIN 
    orderlines ON orders.id = orderlines.order_id AND picking_line.product_id = orderlines.product_id
WHERE 
    picking_line.order_id = 421
GROUP BY 
    picking_line.product_id;

SELECT picking_line.product_id, AVG(picking_line.qty) AS avg_qty
FROM picking_line
JOIN picking_list ON picking_line.picklist_id = picking_list.id
WHERE picking_line.order_id = 421
GROUP BY picking_line.product_id;

SELECT 
  picking_line.product_id,
  AVG(picking_line.qty) AS avg_qty
FROM 
  orders
  JOIN orderlines ON orders.id = orderlines.order_id
  JOIN picking_line ON orders.id = picking_line.order_id
  JOIN picking_list ON picking_line.picklist_id = picking_list.id
WHERE 
  picking_line.order_id = 421
GROUP BY 
  picking_line.product_id;

SELECT

    AVG(picking_line.qty) AS avg_qty

JOIN

JOIN 
    orders ON picking_line.order_id = orders.id
JOIN 
    orderlines ON orders.id = orderlines.order_id AND picking_line.product_id = orderlines.product_id
WHERE

GROUP BY
